check.template: Run `cargo check --all-targets` to verify the project compiles. Fix any errors.

clippy.template: Run `cargo clippy --all-targets` and fix any warnings or errors. Follow project conventions (no comments, use thiserror, etc.).
clippy.description: Run cargo clippy and fix issues

test.template: Run `cargo test --all-targets` and fix any failing tests. Focus on protocol tests in tests/protocol.rs and token consistency tests.

fmt-check.template: Run `cargo fmt` to format all Rust code, then verify with `cargo fmt -- --check`.

ci.template: Run the full CI pipeline: `cargo fmt`, then `cargo check --all-targets`, then `cargo clippy --all-targets`, then `cargo test --all-targets`. Fix any failures.
ci.description: Run full CI pipeline (fmt, check, clippy, test)
